description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a sleek, modern design, featuring a predominantly black upper made from a smooth, synthetic or canvas-like material. The shoe has a white rubber sole with a thick, flat profile and a textured toe cap for added durability. White laces are threaded through four pairs of eyelets, providing a classic closure system. The interior appears to be lined with a light tan or beige material, likely for comfort. Subtle stitching details are visible along the sides and heel, contributing to the shoe's structure and style. There are no visible logos or brand markings, giving the shoe a minimalist and versatile appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A black low-top sneaker with a white rubber sole, white laces, and a minimalist, modern design. The shoe features a smooth upper, textured toe cap, and subtle stitching details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black upper, white laces, thick white sole, and textured toe cap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, white laces, and prominent white toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same black upper, white sole, and subtle stitching.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the heel stitching and light tan interior lining.
